Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0BB8 "HARVEYHEADBANGER-0BB8" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Harvey Headbanger.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The following patches were made to fix the incorrect last cell of the loading screen bitmap which obscured the digit 6 of SIR'86:
1. $CBE7 was changed from $0E to $09 (this is used to set the last 4-bits in colour RAM) 2. $CFE7 was changed from $00 to $E7 (this is the last 8x8 cell in screen RAM)
